rationale: Writing TCK tests for Reactive Streams Publishers; test coverage work, not a driver spec deviation.
Improvement dependent on DRIVERS-792; proactive spec-rollout to relax floating-point precision requirement, not a prior nonconformance.
Improvement per DRIVERS-651; adding ExceededTimeLimit to retryable errors is new spec requirement, not prior wrong behavior.
Routine wire protocol version bump for server 4.4; proactive spec rollout, no prior spec violation.
Improvement per DRIVERS-808 specifying empty authSource behavior; spec gap addressed proactively, not a driver bug.
Change stream tests timing out on Evergreen against latest server; CI test reliability issue.
TLS mutual authentication compatibility issue with MongoDB 4.0 schannel; no specific spec rule contradicted.
Deprecating CodeWScope per DRIVERS-726; proactive API deprecation, not a spec violation.
Deprecating $currentDate per DRIVERS-743; proactive spec-driven API deprecation, not prior wrong behavior.
Internal Java forEach override to ensure cursor closes on exception; implementation detail, no named spec rule violated.
Deprecating oplogReplay per DRIVERS-710; proactive spec deprecation rollout, not a prior nonconformance.
Connection leak when auth fails against mongos; implementation bug, no specific CMAP or auth spec rule cited.
Memory/performance improvement in database name validation; internal optimization, not a spec deviation.
Suppressing a Spotbugs false-positive for try-with-resources in Java 11; build/static-analysis housekeeping.
Improving test coverage around default writeConcern per DRIVERS-440; test infrastructure update.
CRUD spec requires error when hint is specified for unacknowledged update via OP_MSG or OP_UPDATE; driver missing this check.
Deadlock when mixing UNACKNOWLEDGED write concern with retryWrites=true; resolution 'Done' not 'Fixed'; implementation deadlock, no spec rule identified.
Deprecating mapReduce arguments per DRIVERS-711; proactive spec-driven deprecation, not a nonconformance.
IdHoldingBsonWriter incorrectly fires writeEndDocument on nested array; internal BSON writer state machine bug, no BSON spec rule directly named.
UuidCodec mutates underlying byte array causing incorrect second read; internal codec implementation bug, not a BSON spec rule violation.
Retryable writes spec (DRIVERS-525) expands error labels; driver missing required error label handling per spec update.
Updating disabled change stream tests pending SPEC-1505 resolution; test infrastructure maintenance.
Separating BulkWrite tests by operation per DRIVERS-827; test infrastructure reorganization.
Improving mongocryptd test reliability on Evergreen; CI flakiness fix, not a spec behavior issue.
Reducing verbose INFO log noise on Evergreen CI; logging/CI housekeeping, no spec involvement.
SDAM spec requires running the topology update flow even when server description is unchanged; driver was skipping it.
MONGODB-AWS auth spec requires valid AWS STS host parsing; driver regex rejects valid hosts containing dashes.
Integer overflow in GridFSDownloadPublisher for files > 2 GB; implementation bug, no GridFS spec rule about buffer sizing.
Missing Maven artifact bson-scala for driver v4; build/packaging issue, no spec involvement.
Trace logging throws when connection not open; internal logging implementation bug, no spec rule violated.
Race condition between closing and reusing a connection; implementation concurrency bug, no specific CMAP spec rule contradicted.
Evergreen CI investigation ticket for 4.x build errors; CI housekeeping, no spec involvement.
Async change stream stalls on decode error; change stream spec describes resumption on network errors, not decode errors; no specific spec rule named.
Retryable writes spec improvements per DRIVERS-919; proactive spec rollout as Improvement, not a prior nonconformance.
Implementing speculative auth in isMaster per DRIVERS-918; new spec feature, not a prior driver nonconformance.
Adding SDAM test for incompatible-then-compatible server per DRIVERS-923; test infrastructure addition.
Adding hint support for delete per DRIVERS-908; new spec feature implementation, not a prior nonconformance.
BSON encode/decode CPU overhead in Linkbench; pure performance optimization, no spec behavior involved.
Collection and index creation in multi-doc txns per DRIVERS-706; primarily test coverage for new server feature.
GeoJSON constructors throw NPE with Java immutable lists; Java API compatibility bug, no MongoDB spec rule involved.
GeoJSON codec rejects integer coordinates stored by mongod; GeoJSON is not a named MongoDB driver spec area; codec strictness issue.
Adding tests for hint-on-unacknowledged-delete per DRIVERS-970; test infrastructure for spec compliance.
Async channel stays open after stream close due to interrupt race; internal connection implementation bug, no spec rule violated.
DRIVERS-967 requires drivers to propagate WriteConcernError errInfo object; driver was not doing so.
Change streams spec (DRIVERS-973) removes ElectionInProgress from resumable errors; driver had wrong error code in list.
Change streams spec (DRIVERS-907) requires whitelist for resumable errors; driver was using wrong resumability logic.
Scala Observable.zip().head() emits null; Scala reactive API implementation bug, no MongoDB driver spec rule involved.
POJO codec exception message shows 'null' instead of meaningful text; error message quality bug, no BSON spec rule violated.
FLE integration tests use admin DB which is invalid on sharded clusters; test infrastructure fix per DRIVERS-1194.
Evergreen CI build fails due to native memory exhaustion during JVM startup; build/CI infrastructure issue.
